Updated the UAT and Prod pipeline sections to align with the Dev/Test parameter pattern.

Added the required backend parameters for UAT and Prod:
- noProxy
- clientId
- clientSecret
- dediaSftpPrivateKey

Also created the Terraform ELZ UAT Backend variable group and aligned it with the cleaned Dev/Test backend variable group pattern.

Note: For UAT/Prod noProxy, I included the known Terraform backend storage host first. Runtime storage host values can be updated later once confirmed during validation.
